source_catalog.source_title: Redken Shade Charts: Shades EQ, Color Gels Lacquers & More (shade chart download hub)
source_catalog.coverage_summary: Official hub page listing downloadable PDF shade charts for Shades EQ Gloss, Shades EQ Cream & Cover Plus, Shades EQ Bonder Inside, Color Gels Lacquers, Color Gels Lacquers 10 Minute, and Color Gels Oils; also explains swatchbook ordering. Download links present but rendered as 'Download Shade Chart' buttons (hrefs not exposed in text render).
notes: verification detail: fetched-and-read (HTML page loaded successfully; PDF hrefs not visible in rendered text, but the page confirms charts exist for each line)

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Official full Shades EQ Gloss shade chart PDF (filename indicates 2024 edition). Expected to contain full shade enumeration with codes, names, levels, tone families, backgrounds, dilution and mixing guidance.
notes: verification detail: link-confirmed (URL surfaced in web search index pointing to redkenpro.com media library with content extract); direct WebFetch returned HTTP 500 twice (with and without ?rev= param), likely PDF bot-blocking; the extract shown by the search engine for this URL matched 1001 Blondes chart content, so the exact content of this file is not independently confirmed

source_catalog.source_title: Shades EQ 1001 Blondes Large Shade Chart (PDF)
source_catalog.coverage_summary: Official blonde-focused Shades EQ chart: shade codes and names (e.g., 07N Mirage, 09V Platinum Ice, 010AA Butternut), Bonder Inside vs Gloss availability, background color system (black-to-gray / brown-to-tan / zero background), 1:1 mixing with Processing Solution, dilution with 000 Crystal Clear, example formulas. Blonde-range subset, not the complete portfolio.
notes: verification detail: content read via search-engine full-text extraction of this exact URL (substantial PDF text returned); not separately re-fetched

source_catalog.source_title: Shades EQ & Shades EQ Bonder Inside - Equalizing Conditioning Color Gloss chart (Sally/Salon Services PDF)
source_catalog.coverage_summary: Distributor-hosted Shades EQ chart: mixing ratio (1:1 with Shades EQ Processing Solution or Gloss to Gel), 20-minute development time, dedicated developers, dilution with Crystal Clear (000), background-color system, tone families including no-background vivids. Useful technical fallback; hosted by a UK/Sally-affiliated distributor so shade assortment may differ slightly from US.
notes: verification detail: content read via search-engine full-text extraction of this exact URL
caution: salon-services.com is a UK distributor (Sally Beauty group); treat as supplementary to US sources

source_catalog.source_title: Color Gels Lacquers Full Size Shade Chart 2020 - NEW SHADES! (PDF)
source_catalog.coverage_summary: Complete official shade chart: full enumeration of 50+ shades across 13+ tonal families with numeric codes and names (e.g., 5N Walnut, 7NA Pewter, 4ABn Dark Roast, 6NW Brandy), levels 1-10, family descriptions (AB, NA, ABn, N, NN, GB, NW, NG, WG, CB, RB, RO, RR, RV, VRo, GN, Clear), background color system, 1:1 mixing ratio, Pro-oxide developer volumes (10/20/30/40 vol) with lift levels and 30-45 minute processing, gray coverage formulation tables, zone application guidance.
notes: verification detail: fetched-and-read (full PDF text retrieved via WebFetch; complete shade list confirmed present)
copyright line '2020. P2117400' visible in document

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Official US line page: portfolio structure (143 shades across core line + Highlifts, Fashion Lights, Absolutes, Silver Whites sub-lines), numbering system explanation (depth before dash, primary/secondary tone after dash), coverage claims (up to 100% natural, up to 70% fashion), and a 'Download our Shade Overview (PDF, 8.32MB)' link. The PDF href is not exposed in the rendered text.
notes: verification detail: fetched-and-read (HTML loaded; Shade Overview PDF download confirmed to exist on page but its direct URL was not capturable from the text render)

source_catalog.source_title: IGORA Paper Swatch Chart / IGORA ROYAL Oil Developer Usage Table (PDF)
source_catalog.coverage_summary: Official Henkel/Schwarzkopf US chart: full IGORA ROYAL shade-code enumeration by level (1- to 12-) and tone family (Naturals, Cendres & Cools, Beiges & Golds, Chocolates, Reds, Absolutes, Highlifts & Pastels, Specialties, Fashion Lights, Silver Whites, Boosters), numbering system, Oil Developer usage guide (3%/6%/9%/12% with lift levels), mixing ratios (1:1 core, 1:2 Special Blonde 12-), development times (30-45 min; Silver Whites up to 20 min), white-hair coverage rules. Also includes IGORA VIBRANCE and Chroma ID code grids. Shade codes only, no shade names.
notes: verification detail: fetched-and-read (full PDF text retrieved via WebFetch)
copyright '© 2021 Henkel Corporation' and 'Distributed by Schwarzkopf Professional, a division of Henkel Corporation' visible, confirming official US document

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Official instruction-for-use document: numbering system (depths 1-9, tones -0 to -9 with meanings), portfolio structure (Naturals -0/-1/-4, Naturals Extra -00, Fashion -2/-3/-5/-6/-7/-8/-9, Pastels 9.5-/10-, Boosters 0-, Clear 0-00), 1:1 mixing ratio, Activator Gel 1.9% and Lotions 1.9%/4%, development times (5-20 min gloss, 10-20 min full head, 30-45 min white blending), white-hair blending tables, booster mixing tables, pre-pigmentation guide, dual-system application with IGORA ROYAL, longevity per range. Booster codes enumerated (0-11, 0-22, 0-33, 0-55, 0-77, 0-88, 0-89, 0-99); full shade list not enumerated individually.
notes: verification detail: fetched-and-read (full PDF text retrieved via WebFetch)
'© 2022 Henkel Corporation' visible in document

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Official US (SKPUSA) booklet: IGORA numbering system, consistency selection (gel vs cream), Activator Gel 1.9%, and an extensive Redken Shades EQ to IGORA VIBRANCE shade-to-shade conversion table (e.g., 09N -> 9-0 + 9-1 (3:1)), which doubles as a partial shade enumeration of the US VIBRANCE portfolio.
notes: verification detail: content read via search-engine full-text extraction of this exact URL; not separately re-fetched
filename prefix 'SKPUSA' indicates US-market document

missing_source_targets.details: The official full Shades EQ Gloss shade chart PDF (redken-2024-shades-eq-shade-chart.pdf) exists on redkenpro.com but direct fetches returned HTTP 500; the shade-charts hub page renders download buttons without exposing hrefs. Full-portfolio enumeration is currently only covered by the 1001 Blondes subset chart plus a tier-2 distributor chart. Recommend retrying the redkenpro media URL with a browser user agent or pulling charts from the Redken Asset Library.

Wella has moved to an app-first shade chart (Wella Shade Chart app); no current official PDF enumerating every individual Koleston Perfect ME+ shade code with names was located. The usage booklet and technical guides enumerate families and tone codes but not the complete SKU list. The Wellastore US koleston-perfect collection page (us.wella.professionalstore.com/en-US/koleston-perfect) would enumerate US SKUs but the fetch timed out and it remains unverified.

The US line page offers 'Download our Shade Overview (PDF, 8.32MB)' but the direct PDF URL could not be captured from the rendered page. The verified skp.media paper swatch chart enumerates all shade codes but IGORA ROYAL shades generally lack marketing names; the Shade Overview PDF should be captured to confirm the current 143-shade assortment.

The 'IGORA VIBRANCE Service Manual (pdf, 27.84 MB)' download exists on the official tone-on-tone page but its direct URL was not exposed in the text render. The 60+ shade portfolio is partially enumerated via the skp.media paper swatch chart and the SKPUSA conversion booklet; the service manual should be captured for the authoritative full list.

issue_log.details: Direct WebFetch returned HTTP 500 on two attempts (with and without ?rev= query). URL was surfaced by the search engine pointing at the official redkenpro.com media library; recorded as link-confirmed/broken rather than verified content.
SalonCentric (tier-2 fallback) fetch timed out, likely bot protection. Not recorded in source_catalog because the URL and its content could not be verified.

Wellastore US Koleston Perfect collection page fetch timed out; not recorded in source_catalog. The sibling color-touch page on the same domain was successfully read via search extraction, so the store itself is live.

issue_log.item: schwarzkopf-professional.com US pages (IGORA ROYAL, IGORA VIBRANCE tone-on-tone)
issue_log.details: Pages fetched successfully and confirm downloadable PDFs ('Shade Overview', 'Service Manual') exist, but the markdown render did not include the underlying PDF hrefs, so those direct PDF URLs could not be recorded without inventing them.

issue_log.item: Search-extracted PDFs (1001 Blondes chart, Wella usage booklet/leaflet/technical folder, salon-services charts, SKPUSA tentpole booklet, Wella education brochure, Redken 2021 CGL 10-min chart)
issue_log.details: Content for these URLs was read via the search engine's full-text extraction of the exact URL rather than a separate direct fetch; recorded honestly in each source's notes. Items marked 'fetched-and-read' via WebFetch were the Color Gels Lacquers 2020 chart, skp.media IGORA paper swatch chart, Henkel IGORA VIBRANCE IFU, redkenpro shade-charts hub, and both schwarzkopf-professional.com US pages.

salon-services.com is a UK distributor (Sally Beauty group). Its Redken Shades EQ, Koleston Perfect, and Color Touch documents are technically accurate brand documents but may reflect UK assortments; marked tier 2 with cautions.
